expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab main validate, tag deploy/smoke pipeline, production /api/version, Cloud Run /health, and usage guardrails all passed for v8.12.77.
The changed component has a focused DOM test that passed, and the standard quick/type/lint/component-map gates covered the local regression surface.
The change is isolated to a non-interactive background canvas, keeps pointer-events disabled, and preserves reduced-motion handling.
